benefits.description: Lost 42 lbs in the last year, made keeping off initial loss easy and helped dial in another 15 lbs loss. Very easy cut with no grinding exhaustion. On track to reach 12% body fat.

side_effects.description: Itchy skin and increased sensitivity, but passed over time

protocol_notes: Been on Retatrutide since April 2025 (approximately 10 months). Initially had skin itching and sensitivity that resolved. Reports that side effects have subsided over time and body/mind feel evened out in last 2-3 months.
